title: Calculations of a Plane Turbulent Jet
abstract:
A conditionally-modelled joint pdf transport equa- 
tion has been solved to calculate the properties of 
the self-similar, plane, turbulent jet. The joint 
probability density function (pdf) is that of the 
three velocity components and of the nozzle-f h i d  
concentration, which is a conserved passive sca- 
lar. In the pdf transport equation, convective 
transport does not have to be modelled, while the 
effects of dissipation and of the fluctuating pres- 
sure gradient are modelled conditiona
